nodes.name: Asgard
nodes.details: Realm of the Aesir, ruled by Odin. High entry threshold.

nodes.name: Midgard
nodes.details: Realm of humans, starting area full of basic quests.

nodes.name: Jotunheim
nodes.details: Frosty, rocky realm inhabited by Frost Giants.

nodes.name: Niflheim
nodes.details: Realm of eternal ice, fog, and the most dangerous monsters.

nodes.name: Nidavellir
nodes.details: Underground world of master blacksmiths and dwarves.

nodes.name: Muspelheim
nodes.details: Fiery realm ruled by the demon Surtr. Extreme conditions.

nodes.name: Helheim
nodes.details: Realm of the dead, ruled by Loki's daughter - Hel.

nodes.name: Alfheim
nodes.details: Realm of the light elves, full of magic and rare herbs.

nodes.name: Vanaheim
nodes.details: Home of the Vanir gods, overflowing with nature.

nodes.name: Odin
nodes.details: Allfather, repository of knowledge, giver of ultimate quests.

nodes.name: Thor
nodes.details: God of Thunder, offers combat quests.

nodes.name: Freya
nodes.details: Goddess of magic and fertility, teaches mystical runes.

nodes.name: Eitri
nodes.details: Legendary dwarf, master blacksmith from Nidavellir.

nodes.name: Loki
nodes.details: God of mischief. His quests often have hidden catches.

nodes.name: Heimdall
nodes.details: Guardian of the Bifrost bridge, sees and hears everything.

nodes.name: Fenrir
nodes.details: Monstrous wolf destined to devour Odin.

nodes.name: Jormungandr
nodes.details: World Serpent whose body encircles Midgard.

nodes.name: Frost Giant
nodes.details: Warrior from Jotunheim vulnerable to fire.

nodes.name: Surtr
nodes.details: Fire giant wielding a flaming sword.

nodes.name: Nidhogg
nodes.details: Dragon gnawing at the roots of the Yggdrasil tree.

nodes.name: Uru Ore
nodes.details: Magical, incredibly heavy metal that absorbs energy.

nodes.name: Ymir's Blood
nodes.details: Ancient essential fluid with immense creative power.

nodes.name: Jormungandr's Skin
nodes.details: Impenetrable scales resistant to poisons.

nodes.name: Branch of Yggdrasil
nodes.details: Sacred wood from the World Tree.

nodes.name: Flame of Muspelheim
nodes.details: Eternal spark of fire capable of melting any metal.

nodes.name: Mjolnir
nodes.details: Legendary hammer of Thor, always returns to its owner's hands.

nodes.name: Gungnir
nodes.details: Odin's spear that never misses its target.

nodes.name: Megingjord Belt
nodes.details: Magical belt that doubles the user's strength.

nodes.name: Hofund
nodes.details: Heimdall's sword, capable of drawing power from the stars.

nodes.name: Rune Axe
nodes.details: Tool of war covered in protective symbols.

nodes.name: Flaming Sword
nodes.details: Blade imbued with the magic of Muspelheim.

nodes.title: Forge of Destiny
nodes.details: Ignite the ancient furnaces in Nidavellir.

nodes.title: Heimdall's Warning
nodes.details: Investigate anomalies on the rainbow bridge Bifrost.

nodes.title: Twilight of the Gods (Ragnarok)
nodes.details: Take part in the final battle on the Vigrid plain.

nodes.title: Hunt for the Wolf
nodes.details: Imprison Fenrir using the magical ribbon Gleipnir.

nodes.title: Tricks and Lies
nodes.details: Execute a plot commissioned by Loki in secret from Thor.

nodes.name: Lightning Strike
nodes.details: Calls down a lightning bolt on a single target.

nodes.name: Thor's Wrath
nodes.details: Powerful area attack that paralyzes enemies.

nodes.name: Wisdom of Runes
nodes.details: Increases mana regeneration and reveals hidden paths.

nodes.name: Eye of Odin
nodes.details: Passive detection of legendary boss weak points.

nodes.name: Valkyrie's Step
nodes.details: Lightning-fast teleportation on the battlefield.

nodes.name: Breath of Surtr
nodes.details: Stream of living fire, melting even ice.

nodes.name: Fire
nodes.details: The element of fire, burns targets and applies an ignite effect.

nodes.name: Ice
nodes.details: The element of ice, slows enemies and freezes structures.

nodes.name: Lightning
nodes.details: The element of lightning, deals massive burst damage.

nodes.name: Poison
nodes.details: Acidic and toxic element that destroys armor.
